novel_features.name: Single-page scrape
novel_features.description: Scrape a URL into agent-friendly output with Firecrawl authentication and Printing Press JSON/compact controls.

novel_features.name: Multi-page crawl
novel_features.description: Start a Firecrawl crawl job from a base URL with depth, limit, sitemap, and path controls.

novel_features.name: URL map discovery
novel_features.description: Map discoverable URLs for a site as a lightweight pre-crawl discovery workflow.

novel_features.name: Batch scrape and extract
novel_features.description: Submit multiple URLs for scrape/extract jobs with cache, PDF, content, tag, proxy, and batch controls.

novel_features.name: Structured extraction
novel_features.description: Run Firecrawl extraction over URLs with prompt-driven structured data options.
